metadata.title: Sneaking Through Mid for a Fast Double Kill in VALORANT
metadata.description:
Took a careful mid push and caught the enemies by surprise with two quick headshots. Timing and positioning really made this play work.
How do you like to control mid in your games?

#valorant #shorts #gaming #fps #valorantclips

Tell me your favorite mid control strategy in the comments!

#valorant #shorts #gaming #fps #valorantclips
metadata.cta: Tell me your favorite mid control strategy in the comments!
